[204]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 将举军以背杨行密 - Planned to rebel against Yang Xingmi with their armies.
  • 请杜荀持笺诣淮都 - Asked Du Xunzhi to carry a letter to Huai Prefecture.
  • 俄而事泄 - Soon the plot was exposed.
  • 悉兵攻宛陵 - Mobilized all his troops to attack Wanling.
  • 延夀飞骑以赴 - Zhu Yanchou sent cavalry to join the fight.
  • 俱为淮军所杀 - Both were killed by the Huai army.
  • 愿日致一介以宁所懐 - Wished to send a messenger daily to soothe her husband's mind.
  • 一日介不致 - If one messenger is not sent.
  • 部分家僮悉授兵器 - Organized the household servants and gave them weapons.
  • 遽阖州中之扉而捕骑已至 - Quickly closed the city gates, but the pursuing cavalry had already arrived.
  • 不得入 - They could not enter.
  • 发百燎庐舍州焚之 - Lit a hundred torches to burn the houses and the city.
  • 急而稽首上告 - Urgently knelt and bowed to report.
  • 妾誓不以皎然之躯为仇者所辱 - I swear not to let my clear body be disgraced by the enemy.
  • 乃投火而死 - Then threw herself into the fire and died.
  • 古之烈女无以过也 - An example of a heroic woman from ancient times.
  • 木星入斗 - Refers to Jupiter entering the constellation of the Dipper.
  • 金火土犯斗即为灾 - If the stars of metal, fire, or earth invade the Dipper, it brings disaster.
  • 唯木当应为福耳 - Only wood should bring good fortune.
  • 唯斗帝王之宫宿 - The Dipper is the constellation of the emperor's palace.
  • 木在斗中朱字也 - The character 'wood' is inside the Dipper, which forms the character '朱'.
  • 或言将来革运 - Some said it would lead to a change in the dynasty.
  • 或姓裴或姓牛 - It could be someone surnamed Pei or Niu.
  • 所以裴晋公度牛相国僧孺每罹此谤 - So Pei Jun and Niu Sengru often faced this slander.
  • 安知钟于砀山之朱乎 - How could it be destined for Zhu from Dangshan?

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 田頵 - A military leader during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 朱延夀 - Another military leader during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 杨行密 - A prominent warlord during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 杜荀 - A scholar and diplomat during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 王铎 - A high-ranking official during the Tang Dynasty.
  • 干符 - A period of the Tang Dynasty (874-880).
  • 周秦行纪 - Historical records of the Zhou and Qin dynasties.
  • 砀山 - A place name in China.

Proper Nouns

  • 田頵 - A military leader during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 朱延夀 - A military leader during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 杨行密 - A prominent warlord during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 杜荀 - A scholar and diplomat during the late Tang Dynasty.
  • 王铎 - A high-ranking official during the Tang Dynasty.
  • 干符 - A period of the Tang Dynasty (874-880).
  • 周秦行纪 - Historical records of the Zhou and Qin dynasties.
  • 砀山 - A place name in China.

[205]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 木中异文 - Literal expression meaning 'strange writing in wood,' referring to unusual or mysterious inscriptions found in wood.
  • 梁开平中 - Temporal expression meaning 'during the Kai Ping era of the Later Liang dynasty,' indicating a specific historical period.
  • 潞州军前 - Refers to the military front of the state of Lu (潞州) during the Later Liang period.
  • 壶关县庶穰乡 - Refers to a specific location, 'Shu Rang village in Hu Guan County.'
  • 伐树倒分为两片 - Literal expression meaning 'the tree fell and split into two pieces,' describing a physical event.
  • 天十四载 - Date expression meaning 'the fourteenth year of the Heavenly era,' likely referring to a specific calendar system or era name.
  • 图其状以献 - Literal expression meaning 'to draw its form and present it,' describing an action of documenting and presenting the inscription.
  • 付史馆 - Bureaucratic expression meaning 'to entrust to the historical archives,' indicating the inscription was recorded for historical purposes.
  • 尔后唐庄宗皇帝自晋王登位 - Historical expression meaning 'after Emperor Zhuangzong of Tang ascended the throne from the Prince of Jin,' indicating a transition in power.
  • 中间石氏自并门受国称首朝 - Historical expression meaning 'in between, the Shi family received the country from Bing Gate and claimed the first court,' referring to the rise of the Shi family.
  • 湖南马希范 - Refers to Ma Xifan, a historical figure from Hunan.
  • 解释此字表闻焉 - Literal expression meaning 'to explain this character and report it,' indicating an action of interpreting and reporting the inscription.
  • 梁相国薛贻矩 - Refers to Xue Yiju, a high-ranking official during the Later Liang dynasty.
  • 名家子 - Social expression meaning 'a son of a prominent family,' indicating Xue Yiju's noble background.
  • 擢进士第 - Bureaucratic expression meaning 'to be promoted to the rank of Jinshi,' indicating Xue Yiju's successful passing of the imperial examinations.
  • 御史大夫 - Refers to a high-ranking official position in the imperial bureaucracy.
  • 天复中 - Temporal expression meaning 'during the Tian Fu era,' referring to a specific period in history.
  • 南班官忌与北司交通 - Historical expression meaning 'southern court officials feared and avoided communication with the northern service,' indicating a political divide.
  • 翦戮阉官 - Historical expression meaning 'to cut and kill eunuchs,' referring to a specific event involving the elimination of eunuchs.
  • 写真赞 - Literary expression meaning 'to write a eulogy or inscription,' referring to a specific type of writing.
  • 悉纪于内侍省屋壁间 - Bureaucratic expression meaning 'to record it all on the walls of the inner service hall,' indicating where the eulogy was recorded.
  • 坐是谪官 - Bureaucratic expression meaning 'to be demoted from office due to this,' indicating the consequence of Xue Yiju's actions.
  • 赍唐帝命禅于梁 - Historical expression meaning 'to carry the decree of the Tang emperor to abdicate to the Liang,' indicating a specific historical event.
  • 仕至宰相 - Bureaucratic expression meaning 'to rise to the position of chancellor,' indicating Xue Yiju's highest rank.
  • 舂磨寨 - Refers to a specific location, 'Chong Mo Camp.'
  • 黄巢自长安遁归 - Historical expression meaning 'Huang Chao fled from Chang'an back to his base,' referring to Huang Chao's retreat.
  • 与其众屯于陈蔡间 - Historical expression meaning 'with his troops stationed between Chen and Cai,' indicating Huang Chao's location.
  • 溵河下寨 - Refers to a specific location, 'a camp on the Yin River.'
  • 连络号八山营 - Literal expression meaning 'connected and named the Eight Mountain Camp,' describing the structure of Huang Chao's camp.
  • 秦宗权 - Refers to Qin Zongquan, a historical figure.
  • 惧巢以城降 - Historical expression meaning 'fearing Huang Chao, he surrendered the city,' indicating Qin Zongquan's action.
  • 既饥乏 - Literal expression meaning 'already hungry and lacking,' describing a state of deprivation.
  • 野无所掠 - Literal expression meaning 'nothing to plunder in the wild,' indicating a lack of resources.
  • 唯捕人为食 - Literal expression meaning 'only capturing people to eat,' describing a desperate situation.
  • 肉尽继之以骨 - Literal expression meaning 'when meat was gone, they followed it with bones,' indicating a progression of desperation.
  • 或碓捣或硙磨 - Literal expression meaning 'either pounded with a pestle or ground with a mill,' describing methods of preparing food.
  • 咸用充饥 - Literal expression meaning 'all used to fill the hunger,' indicating the necessity of these methods.
  • 天军四合 - Military expression meaning 'heavenly troops gathered from all sides,' describing a military encirclement.
  • 巢军不利 - Military expression meaning 'Huang Chao's troops were at a disadvantage,' indicating a military setback.
  • 其党骇散 - Literal expression meaning 'his followers were terrified and scattered,' describing the reaction of Huang Chao's troops.
  • 频为雷电大雨淹浸其营 - Literal expression meaning 'frequent thunderstorms and heavy rains flooded his camp,' describing a natural disaster.
  • 乃与妻孥昆弟奔于泰山狼虎谷 - Literal expression meaning 'he then fled with his wife, children, and brothers to the Wolf Tiger Valley on Mount Tai,' indicating Huang Chao's escape.
  • 为外甥林言斩首 - Historical expression meaning 'his nephew Lin Yan beheaded him,' indicating the end of Huang Chao's life.
  • 送徐州时溥下禆将李师鋭函首送成都行在也 - Historical expression meaning 'sent to Xu Zhou, where Shi Yi, a subordinate general, sent his head to Chengdu, the imperial residence,' indicating the disposal of Huang Chao's head.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 梁开平中 - Refers to the Kai Ping era of the Later Liang dynasty (907-923), a specific period in Chinese history.
  • 潞州军前 - Refers to the military front of the state of Lu during the Later Liang period, indicating a specific geographical and political context.
  • 壶关县庶穰乡 - Refers to a specific location, 'Shu Rang village in Hu Guan County,' indicating a historical place.
  • 天十四载 - Likely refers to a specific year in the Heavenly era, indicating a specific calendar system or era name.
  • 石进 - Likely refers to a historical figure who submitted the inscription, indicating a specific person.
  • 图其状以献 - Refers to the act of documenting and presenting the inscription, indicating a specific historical event.
  • 付史馆 - Refers to the historical archives, indicating where the inscription was recorded.
  • 尔后唐庄宗皇帝自晋王登位 - Refers to Emperor Zhuangzong of Tang, who ascended the throne from the Prince of Jin, indicating a specific historical transition.
  • 中间石氏自并门受国称首朝 - Refers to the rise of the Shi family, indicating a specific historical event.
  • 湖南马希范 - Refers to Ma Xifan, a historical figure from Hunan, indicating a specific historical figure.
  • 解释此字表闻焉 - Refers to the act of interpreting and reporting the inscription, indicating a specific historical event.
  • 梁相国薛贻矩 - Refers to Xue Yiju, a high-ranking official during the Later Liang dynasty, indicating a specific historical figure.
  • 名家子 - Refers to a son of a prominent family, indicating Xue Yiju's noble background.
  • 擢进士第 - Refers to the imperial examinations, indicating a specific bureaucratic process.
  • 御史大夫 - Refers to a high-ranking official position in the imperial bureaucracy, indicating a specific bureaucratic role.
  • 天复中 - Refers to the Tian Fu era, indicating a specific period in history.
  • 南班官忌与北司交通 - Refers to a political divide between southern and northern officials, indicating a specific historical context.
  • 翦戮阉官 - Refers to the elimination of eunuchs, indicating a specific historical event.
  • 写真赞 - Refers to a specific type of writing, indicating a specific literary form.

[206]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 脫難 - A compound meaning 'escape from difficulty' or 'overcome a crisis.'
  • 親征 - Means 'to lead a military campaign personally,' indicating the emperor's direct involvement in military affairs.
  • 時筑新垒土工毕 - This phrase describes the construction of new fortifications, with '时' indicating the time of action and '筑新垒土工毕' meaning 'the construction of new earthworks was completed.'
  • 登眺 - Means 'to ascend and look out,' often used in the context of surveying the landscape.
  • 飞鸟止于峻堞之间而噪其声甚厉 - A vivid description of birds perching on high walls and making loud noises. '飞鸟' means 'flying birds,' '止于峻堞之间' means 'perching on the high walls,' and '噪其声甚厉' means 'making loud noises.'
  • 前军朱友裕为朱瑄掩扑拔军南去 - This phrase describes the retreat of the front-line troops. '前军' means 'front-line troops,' '朱友裕' is a proper name, '为朱瑄掩扑' means 'were attacked by Zhu Xuan,' and '拔军南去' means 'retreated southward.'
  • 忽见沟内蜀黍秆积以为道 - This phrase describes the sudden discovery of a path. '忽见' means 'suddenly saw,' '沟内' means 'inside the ditch,' '蜀黍秆积' means 'accumulated corn stalks,' and '以为道' means 'as a path.'
  • 腾跃而过 - Means 'leaped over,' describing the action of jumping over the ditch.
  • 副使李璠都将髙行思为贼所杀 - This phrase describes the death of a deputy commander. '副使李璠' is a proper name, '都将髙行思' is another proper name, and '为贼所杀' means 'killed by the enemy.'
  • 张归宇为殿骑授戈力战仅得生还 - This phrase describes the survival of a general. '张归宇' is a proper name, '为殿骑' means 'as a rear guard,' '授戈力战' means 'fought bravely with a spear,' and '仅得生还' means 'barely survived.'
  • 被十四五箭 - Means 'wounded by fifteen or sixteen arrows,' indicating the severity of the injury.
  • 梁祖梦丁防 - This phrase introduces a dream. '梁祖' is a proper name, and '梦丁防' means 'dreamed of Ding Fang.'
  • 昭义节帅 - Means 'commander of the Zhaoyi circuit,' referring to a military leader.
  • 功臣 - Means 'meritorious subject,' referring to a person who has made significant contributions.
  • 忽谓敬翔曰 - This phrase describes a sudden conversation. '忽' means 'suddenly,' '谓' means 'said,' and '敬翔' is a proper name.
  • 吾梦丁防在前祗候 - This phrase describes the dream. '吾' means 'I,' '梦丁防' means 'dreamed of Ding Fang,' '在前' means 'in front,' and '祗候' means 'waiting.'
  • 将乗马欲出圉人以马就台 - This phrase describes the dream scenario. '将乗马' means 'about to ride a horse,' '欲出' means 'about to leave,' '圉人' means 'stable boy,' and '以马就台' means 'brought the horse to the platform.'
  • 忽为丁防跨之以出 - This phrase describes the unexpected action in the dream. '忽' means 'suddenly,' '为丁防跨之' means 'Ding Fang leaped onto it,' and '以出' means 'and left.'
  • 时梦中怒叱喝数声 - This phrase describes the emotional state in the dream. '时梦中' means 'in the dream,' '怒叱喝数声' means 'shouted angrily several times.'
  • 因惊觉甚恶之 - This phrase describes the reaction to the dream. '因惊觉' means 'woke up in a panic,' and '甚恶之' means 'found it very ominous.'
  • 是月丁防举潞州军民归河东矣 - This phrase describes a historical event. '是月' means 'that month,' '丁防' is a proper name, '举潞州军民' means 'led the people of Lushui,' and '归河东矣' means 'returned to Hedong.'

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 梁祖 - Refers to Emperor Zhu Wen (Emperor Taizu of Later Liang), the founder of the Later Liang dynasty.
  • 朱友裕 - A general under Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 朱瑄 - A rival general during the late Tang dynasty.
  • 李璠 - A deputy commander under Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 张归宇 - A general who fought bravely in the battle.
  • 丁防 - A general and commander of the Zhaoyi circuit.
  • 敬翔 - A trusted advisor to Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 潞州 - A region in modern-day Shanxi province.
  • 河东 - A historical region in modern-day Shanxi province.

Proper Nouns

  • 梁祖 - Emperor Zhu Wen (Emperor Taizu of Later Liang).
  • 朱友裕 - A general under Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 朱瑄 - A rival general during the late Tang dynasty.
  • 李璠 - A deputy commander under Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 张归宇 - A general who fought bravely in the battle.
  • 丁防 - A general and commander of the Zhaoyi circuit.
  • 敬翔 - A trusted advisor to Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 潞州 - A region in modern-day Shanxi province.
  • 河东 - A historical region in modern-day Shanxi province.

[207]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 殿栋折坠 - Literal description of a large beam in a palace collapsing; carries a sense of grandeur and importance.
  • 初闻土落于寝帐上乃惊觉 - Describes the initial reaction to hearing something fall on the sleeping mat; '初闻' means 'at first hearing,' and '惊觉' means 'startled awake.'
  • 又闻有小木坠于帐顶间遂矍然下牀 - '又闻' means 'then heard,' '小木' refers to a small piece of wood, and '矍然' means 'startled.' '下牀' means 'got out of bed.'
  • 迟明召诸王近臣令观之 - '迟明' means 'early morning,' '召' means 'summon,' '诸王近臣' means 'various princes and ministers,' and '令观之' means 'to observe it.'
  • 防不相见由是君臣相泣 - '防不相见' means 'fearing not to see each other,' and '相泣' means 'cried together.'
  • 惊忧之时如有人引头于寝閤门内云里面莫有人否 - '惊忧之时' means 'in a state of fear and worry,' '引头' means 'pulled their head in,' '寝閤门内' means 'inside the sleeping chamber door,' and '莫有人否' means 'is there no one inside?'
  • 怱忙奔起得非宫殿神乎 - '怱忙' means 'hurriedly,' '奔起' means 'ran out,' and '得非宫殿神乎' means 'is it not the spirit of the palace?'
  • 他日又游于大内西九曲池泛鹢舟于池上 - '他日' means 'another day,' '游于大内西九曲池' means 'roamed in the Western Nine-Bend Pool of the Inner Palace,' and '泛鹢舟于池上' means 'sailed a swan boat on the pool.'
  • 忽闻倾侧上堕于池中 - '忽闻' means 'suddenly heard,' '倾侧' means 'tilted,' and '上堕于池中' means 'fell into the pool.'
  • 宫嫔并内侍从官并跃入池扶策登岸 - '宫嫔' means 'court ladies,' '内侍从官' means 'attendants and officials,' and '跃入池扶策登岸' means 'jumped into the pool to help him onto the shore.'
  • 移时方安尔后发痼疾竟罹其子郢王友珪弑逆之祸 - '移时' means 'after some time,' '方安' means 'finally calmed down,' '尔后' means 'thereafter,' '发痼疾' means 'contracted a chronic illness,' '竟罹' means 'eventually suffered,' and '郢王友珪弑逆之祸' means 'the disaster of being assassinated by his son, Prince Ying, who was a rebel.'
  • 舟倾栋折非佳事也 - '舟倾' means 'boat capsized,' '栋折' means 'beam broke,' and '非佳事也' means 'not a good thing.'

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 梁祖 - Refers to Emperor Zhuangzong of Later Liang (Li Cunxu).
  • 殿栋 - Refers to a large beam in a palace, symbolizing the strength and stability of the imperial structure.
  • 寝殿 - Refers to the sleeping quarters of the emperor.
  • 诸王近臣 - Refers to the emperor's princes and ministers.
  • 九曲池 - Refers to a scenic pool in the imperial gardens.
  • 鹢舟 - Refers to a boat shaped like a swan, often used for pleasure or ceremonial purposes.
  • 宫嫔 - Refers to the emperor's concubines.
  • 内侍从官 - Refers to the emperor's attendants and officials.
  • 深州界 - Refers to the border of Shen Prefecture.
  • 枣强县 - Refers to Zaoqiang County, a location in Hebei.
  • 杨师厚 - Refers to a general under Emperor Zhuangzong.
  • 郢王友珪 - Refers to Li Siyuan, who later became Emperor Taizu of Later Tang and assassinated Emperor Zhuangzong.
  • 河朔之民 - Refers to the people of the Hebei region, known for their martial spirit.

Syntactic Ambiguities

  • The phrase '殿栋折坠' is straightforward but can be interpreted as a dramatic event.
  • The sequence of events in '初闻土落于寝帐上乃惊觉' is clear but requires careful reading to understand the timeline.
  • The sequence of events in '又闻有小木坠于帐顶间遂矍然下牀' continues, with the subject's actions following the sounds.
  • The timing and purpose of the summons in '迟明召诸王近臣令观之' are clear.
  • The emotional context in '防不相见由是君臣相泣' is clear, but the cause of the tears is subtle.
  • The description in '惊忧之时如有人引头于寝閤门内云里面莫有人否' is detailed and requires careful interpretation.
  • The description in '怱忙奔起得非宫殿神乎' is vivid and requires careful interpretation.
  • The sequence of events in '他日又游于大内西九曲池泛鹢舟于池上' is clear but requires careful reading to understand the timeline.
  • The description in '忽闻倾侧上堕于池中' is vivid and requires careful interpretation.
  • The description in '宫嫔并内侍从官并跃入池扶策登岸' is vivid and requires careful interpretation.
  • The sequence of events in '移时方安尔后发痼疾竟罹其子郢王友珪弑逆之祸' is clear but requires careful reading to understand the timeline.
  • The description in '舟倾栋折非佳事也' is straightforward but carries a sense of grandeur and importance.

[208]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 每见吉凶不敢明言稍关逆耳秘而不説 - Formal description of cautious behavior, avoiding direct statements that might be displeasing.
  • 方懐子孙之忧唯柏乡狼狈亦自咎云违犯天道不取仇殷之言也 - Indicates concern about the future, feeling that misfortunes were due to ignoring Cui Yin's advice.

Cultural and Historical Allusions

  • 梁 - The Later Liang dynasty, founded by Emperor Zhu Wen.
  • 司天监 - The official title for the chief astronomer, responsible for astrology and divination.
  • 昭义 - The state of Zhao.
  • 符道昭 - Fu Daozhang, a general of the Later Liang.
  • 柏乡 - Boling, a place where a significant battle took place.
  • 王景仁 - Wang Jingren, a general of the Later Liang.
  • 太原节使嗣晋王李存朂之 - Li Cunxu, the Prince of Jin.
  • 北梦琐言 - A historical record compiled during the Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period.
  • 钦定四库全书 - The 'Complete Library in Four Branches of Literature,' a massive compendium of Chinese literature and scholarship.

Proper Nouns

  • 仇殷 - Cui Yin, the chief astronomer of the Later Liang.
  • 梁祖 - Emperor Zhu Wen, the founder of the Later Liang.

[209]

Idiomatic Expressions

  • 汴帅非吾子也 - Statement of non-kinship, emphasizing that the general of Kaifeng is not his son.
  • 使者具陈离乡去里之由 - Envoys fully explain the reasons for leaving one's hometown and village.
  • 归国立功之事 - Returning to one's country to establish achievements or merit.
  • 王氏方泣而信 - Wang just cried and believed.
  • 温盛礼郊迎 - Wen welcomed with a warm and grand ceremony at the outskirts of the city.
  • 人士改观 - People or officials changed their perception.
  • 崇以旧恩位至列卿 - Chong reached the position of a high-ranking official due to old favor or kindness.
  • 为商州刺史 - Served as the governor of Shangzhou.
  • 王氏以温贵封晋国太夫人 - Wang was enfeoffed as the Dowager of Jin State because of Wen's rank.
  • 仲兄存于贼中为矢石所中而卒 - Second brother survived among the rebels but died from being hit by arrows and stones.
  • 温致酒于母欢甚 - Wen brought wine to his mother, who was very joyful.
  • 语及家事 - Talked about family affairs.
  • 朱五经辛苦业儒不登一命 - Zhu worked hard studying Confucianism but did not achieve any official rank.
  • 今有子为节度使无忝先人矣 - Now has a son who is a military governor, not disgracing one's ancestors.
  • 母不怿良久 - Mother was not pleased for a long time.
  • 汝致身及此信谓英特行义未必如先人 - You reached this position, truly believing that noble conduct and righteousness may not be as good as one's ancestors.
  • 朱二与汝同入贼军身死蛮徼 - Zhu Er entered the rebel army with you and died in a remote border area.
  • 孤男稚女艰食无告 - Orphaned boys and young girls had difficulty finding food and had no one to turn to.
  • 汝未有恤孤之心 - You do not have compassion for orphans.
  • 英特即有诸无取也 - Even if there are noble qualities, it is not desirable.

Syntactic Ambiguities

  • Pregnant fetus speaking: '娠子能语' requires careful translation to convey the idea of a fetus speaking.
  • Long sentence: '后唐明宗皇帝微时随蕃将李存信巡边宿于雁门逆旅' must be read as a single event where Emperor Mingzong accompanied a general on a border patrol and stayed at an inn.
  • Sequence of events: '逆旅媪方娠慢不得具食腹中儿语谓母曰天子至宜速具食声闻于外' must be read as a single event where the innkeeper's pregnant woman was slow in preparing food, and the fetus inside spoke to her, causing the voice to be heard outside.
  • Sequence of actions: '媪异之遽起亲奉庖爨敬事尤谨' describes the innkeeper's reaction and subsequent actions in a single sequence.
  • Sequence of questioning and explanation: '诘之曰公贵不可言也问其故具道娠子腹语事' describes the emperor's questioning and the innkeeper's explanation in a single event.
  • Linking humility to fulfillment: '老媪逊言惧吾辱耳后果如其言' links the innkeeper's humility to the later fulfillment of her words.
  • Character description: '明宗不伐始在军中居常唯治兵仗不事生产雄武谦和临财尤廉家财屡空处之晏如也' describes Emperor Mingzong's character and behavior in a single paragraph.
  • Test of honesty: '太祖欲试以诚召于泉府命恣意取之所取不过束帛数缗而已所得赐与必分部下战胜凯还侪类自伐帝徐言曰人战以口我战以手众皆心服其能' describes Emperor Taizu's test of Emperor Mingzong's honesty and the subsequent admiration of his fellow soldiers.
